title: MCP Tool Tag Taxonomy
description: Closed set of tags for categorizing MCP server tools. Tags are assigned to tools in .ai-badger/mcp-tools.yaml and used by the mcp-index skill and pre_llm_call hooks for tool recommendation.

language.description: Programming languages and markup that the tool operates on.

action.description: What the tool does — its primary operation.

domain.description: Technology domain or subsystem the tool interacts with.

meta.description: Non-functional characteristics that affect tool selection strategy.
